entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: An important food crop in the arid and semi-arid tropical regions of Africa and Asia.

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: Environmental regions where pearl millet is primarily grown.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is grown and iron and zinc deficiencies are widespread.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is grown.

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A micronutrient whose density is increased in pearl millet through biofortification.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micronutrient whose density is increased in pearl millet through biofortification.

entities.name: IRON AND ZINC DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: Widespread public health problems worldwide, including in India and Africa.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where biofortified pearl millet varieties and hybrids have been developed and released.

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A cost-effective and sustainable agricultural strategy to address micronutrient deficiencies.

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing biofortified pearl millet varieties and hybrids to enhance nutrition.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The range of iron and zinc densities available in pearl millet used for developing high-yielding cultivars.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A productivity measure of pearl millet cultivars and hybrids.

entities.name: DHANASHAKTI
entities.description: An open-pollinated variety of biofortified pearl millet with high grain yield and high iron and zinc densities.

entities.name: ICMH 1202
entities.description: A hybrid variety of biofortified pearl millet with high grain yield and high iron and zinc densities.

entities.name: ICMH 1203
entities.description: A hybrid variety of biofortified pearl millet with high grain yield and high iron and zinc densities.

entities.name: ICMH 1301
entities.description: A hybrid variety of biofortified pearl millet with high grain yield and high iron and zinc densities.

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL INSECURITY
entities.description: A societal problem addressed by the development and market promotion of biofortified crops.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health issue addressed through breeding and market opportunities for biofortified crops.

entities.name: PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM
entities.description: A system for integrating biofortified crops to increase market demand and nutritional reach.
